abhi-sam-√bandh -badhnāti, to refer to (acc.), mean by Comm. on  BṛĀrUp.  :
Pass. -badhyate, ‘to be referred to’, belong to, require to be connected with (instr. [ Pat. ] or acc. [ Pāṇ. ii, 1, 6  and 2, 11 , Sch. &c.]).
